useWhen: 1. Sign up at aiwritebook.com and start a new book project or import an existing manuscript (.docx, .pdf, .epub, .txt). 2. Use the AI outline generator to create a chapter-by-chapter structure with a story bible, or set up your non-fiction framework. 3. Build characters using the AI character builder — define arcs, motivations, and relationships. 4. Write chapters with AI assistance that matches your personal voice and style. 5. Edit with the AI chat editor featuring diff view to accept or reject suggested changes. 6. Generate book covers and in-chapter illustrations using built-in AI design tools. 7. Run KDP keyword research and competitor analysis to optimize your book listing. 8. Export your finished book with one click in KDP-ready formats (ePub + print PDF). 9. Optionally generate an audiobook version of your completed book. 10. Publish directly to Amazon KDP or other platforms.
